propositions: Integrate task-decomposition SOTA recommendations R1-R7 into the plan-review gate, each validated by an experiment (E1,E2,E3,E5,E6) before implementation.
E1 must freeze and commit ground-truth corpora with inter-rater kappa >= 0.7 before any dependent recommendation lands.
Detection-bearing recommendations may only ship behind a passing eval gate; failing or inconclusive experiments cause dependent stories to close deferred with results recorded.
R6 is a deterministic no-detection coaching move that ships first without an eval gate, validated by dogfooding via R7 instrumentation.
Validated changes land directly in the packaged review registry/rubrics with no config-flag or overlay gating; A/B experiment E4 is dropped per operator no-A/B directive.
A criterion whose trailing blocking-FP proxy exceeds 10% is demoted to advisory posture via a criteria_routing.json change.
